assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly separates Phase 2 (L4 pool) and Phase 3 (A100 pool) with different timing and considerations for each pool

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response recommends autoscaled blue-green strategy for L4 pool, not surge upgrade. Only mentions surge as an alternative with maxSurge=0, maxUnavailable=1

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response includes GPU driver compatibility validation in pre-upgrade checklist and mentions testing with inference models and frameworks

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states to start A100 upgrade 'only when no long-running fine-tuning jobs active' and includes commands to check for active jobs

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'GPU VMs don't support live migration' and discusses avoiding 'inference latency spikes from pod restarts'

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'PDBs configured for fine-tuning workloads' in checklist and includes monitoring for 'PDB violations'

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response specifically notes 'Autoscaler conflicts: May create nodes at old version during upgrade — acceptable, upgrade will catch up'

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes 'GPU driver compatibility confirmed between 1.31 → 1.32 (test in staging cluster)' and 'CUDA version changes validated' in pre-upgrade checklist
